Introduction

About Me

Hi, I'm Akhil Reddy, currently pursuing B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science at Amrita Vishwa Vidhyapeetham, Amritapuri. I enjoy building IoT projects, exploring deep learning, and learning new technologies.

I like solving real-world problems — whether it's a wearable safety device or a swarm robotics system for smart irrigation. Always eager to learn and improve.

Work

Projects

Smart IoT Wearable Safety Device  (2025)

Arduino ESP32Accelerometer GPSGSM / WiFiEmbedded C

Developed an IoT-based wearable safety device that detects sudden falls using an accelerometer. Automatically sends emergency SOS alerts with GPS location to predefined contacts via GSM/WiFi.

Cantilever Beam Analysis using ANSYS  (2024)

ANSYS WorkbenchFEA

Performed finite element analysis of a cantilever beam to study stress distribution, deformation patterns, and the effect of mesh discretization and different element types.

Line Following Robot – Smart Home Safety  (2024)

Arduino IDEIoT

Developed a smart home safety system using IoT to monitor hazards such as gas leaks, fire, or intrusions and send real-time alerts to users for quick emergency response.

Multi-Source Power Management – OR-ing Circuit

ProteusCircuit Design

Designed and analysed an OR-ing circuit to combine multiple power sources, ensuring reliable supply and preventing reverse current flow between sources in embedded systems.

Swarm Robotics for Smart Irrigation

Deep LearningSwarm Robotics

Designed a swarm robotics system where multiple autonomous robots coordinate to monitor soil moisture and use deep learning to optimise water distribution across agricultural fields.
